steps.title: Find the shared observation
steps.content:
The key signal is this: both texts describe mesquite providing shade that protects agaves.

Text 1 states that mesquite “provide shade for agaves” and says this helps protect agaves “from the harshest heat and light and thereby helps prevent soil moisture from evaporating.” Text 2 confirms this when it describes how O'odham farmers strategically plant agaves near mesquite trees “for protection from the sun and heat”.

steps.title: Match the shared point
steps.content:
The correct answer states what both texts establish: mesquite shade protects agaves from intense heat and light.

The other three either focus on details not shared across both texts (B's sap production, C's soil moisture prevention), or contradict what's stated (D's claim that agaves don't require shade contradicts Text 2).

That is the correct answer.
